summary: Completed frontend testing for modal component refactoring. All 6 extracted modal components (QuickEditModal, SaleLabelsModal, TierPricingModal, BulkSaleModal, CanopyStockModal, CustomMappingsModal) verified working correctly after extraction from SupplierProducts.js.
critical_code_review_comments: SupplierProducts.js (10,304 lines): File is very large, recommended to continue extracting more components for maintainability
ESLint warnings present for useEffect/useCallback missing dependencies in STORAGE_KEYS - minor issue, not blocking functionality
All modal components properly receive props and render correctly
Modal state management (open/close) working correctly through React state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modal refactoring complete and verified. 6 modal components extracted and tested. Main SupplierProducts.js file still large (10K+ lines) - future refactoring could extract more components.

elements_verified: List Price and Cost Price fields
In Stock / Always In Stock checkboxes

elements_verified: Preset label buttons (Sale, Clearance, New Arrival, Limited Stock, Best Seller)
WAS Markup % and WAS Price fields

elements_verified: Live Preview with actual pricing calculations

Label selection (Sale, Clearance, New Arrival, Limited Stock, Best Seller)

elements_verified: Text area for pasting stock data
Search by name or SKU input
Empty state message when no mappings
